_meta._note: Built-in-agent uses the in-memory runner, which allows one active run per thread. Keep each suggestion-pill turn short and deterministic: one set_steps tool call updates the state card, then a toolCallId-keyed follow-up closes the assistant turn. This still exercises the productized frontend state rendering without a long artificial seven-call loop that can overlap the next D6 click.

fixtures._comment: Product launch follow-up after set_steps updates state.

response.content: Launch plan ready. Goals, rollout, and first-week metrics are all mapped.

toolCalls.name: set_steps
toolCalls.arguments: {"steps":[{"id":"launch-1","title":"Define launch goals and audience","status":"completed"},{"id":"launch-2","title":"Coordinate marketing and PR rollout","status":"completed"},{"id":"launch-3","title":"Track post-launch metrics for week 1","status":"completed"}]}
